SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IM, HARRISON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BLILER, WILLIAM B. DEFENDANT ALSO AGREES TO NOT SEEK ANY ADDITIONAL COSTS AGAINST PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
